title: thymus serpyllum f. austriacus
intro: Thymus serpyllum f. austriacus, also known as the Austrian creeping thyme, is a subspecies of the Thymus serpyllum plant, a low-growing, spreading perennial herb native to Europe. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Thymus serpyllum f. austriacus include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and improve respiratory health, making it a popular herbal remedy for colds, coughs, and bronchitis. Thymus serpyllum f. austriacus can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and well-being.
